channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Link Feed
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: The Iran war has pushed some countries away from oil and toward clean energy
item.description:
The new round of bombing in the Middle East has underscored the precarity of relying on fossil fuels. The war is speeding up the global transition to EVs, solar, and batteries, experts say.

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 · reposts: 1134 · likes: 3908

item.description:
George Cottrell’s mother, Fiona, at centre of criminal inquiry over potential evasion of restrictions on donations

item.title: Migrants who saw man killed by ICE in Houston say he did not ram officers
item.description:

item.title: He wrote a scathing message to ICE. Federal agents showed up at his door.

item.title: Man sues DHS after agents tracked him down for sending a scathing email to ICE
item.description:
Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing.

reposts: 237 · likes: 605

item.description:

item.title: The Pacific Ocean is running a fever. Why that’s an ominous sign.

item.title: Justice Samuel Alito, who wrote the opinion overturning Roe v. Wade, retires
item.description:
